@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "caddy-3219-disabling-http-to-https-redirect-from-caddyfile",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "caddy: Disabling http-to-https redirect from Caddyfile",
+    "description": "Disabling http-to-https redirect from Caddyfile. Requested by 6+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current caddy setup",
+        "description": "Verify your caddy version and configuration:\n```bash\ncaddy version\n```\nThis feature requires a working caddy installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review caddy configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant caddy configuration:\nIs it possible to [disable the HTTP-to-HTTPS redirects](https://caddyserver.com/docs/json/apps/http/servers/automatic_https/disable_redirects/) in Caddyfile?\n\nMy Caddyfile is:\n\n```\nsourcegraph.test:3443\ntls internal\nreverse_proxy"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Disabling http-to-https redirect from Caddyfile",
+        "description": "Hi Quinn! 👋 \n\nIt's not possible in the Caddyfile yet -- probably will be in 2.1 -- but for now you can set the HTTP port to something higher that has permission, by putting an options block at the top of your Caddyfile:\n\n```\n{\n    http_port 8080\n}\n```\n```yaml\nsourcegraph.test:3443\ntls internal\nreverse_proxy localhost:3080\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Disabling http-to-https redirect from Caddyfile\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Hi Quinn! 👋 \n\nIt's not possible in the Caddyfile yet -- probably will be in 2.1 -- but for now you can set the HTTP port to something higher that has permission, by putting an options block at the top of your Caddyfile:\n\n```\n{\n    http_port 8080\n}\n```",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "sourcegraph.test:3443\ntls internal\nreverse_proxy localhost:3080",
+        "$ caddy run --config=dev/Caddyfile\n2020/04/03 05:14:29.418\tINFO\tusing provided configuration\t{\"config_file\": \"dev/Caddyfile\", \"config_adapter\": \"\"}\n2020/04/03 05:14:29.419\tINFO\tadmin\tadmin endpoint started\t{\"address\": \"localhost:2019\", \"enforce_origin\": false, \"origins\": [\"localhost:2019\"]}\n2020/04/02 22:14:29 [INFO][cache:0xc0009afc20] Started certificate maintenance routine\n2020/04/03 05:14:29.427\tINFO\thttp\tenabling automatic HTTP->HTTPS redirects\t{\"server_name\": \"srv0\"}\n2020/04/03 05:14:29.468\tINFO\tpki.ca.local\troot certificate is already trusted by system\t{\"path\": \"storage:pki/authorities/local/root.crt\"}\n2020/04/03 05:14:29.468\tINFO\ttls\tcleaned up storage units\nrun: loading initial config: loading new config: http app module: start: tcp: listening on :80: listen tcp :80: bind: permiss",
+        "{\n    http_port 8080\n}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
